@@ -38,5 +38,5 @@
 - Changes: collapsed the local conflict predicate in `collect_slot_conflicts` from a temporary `if request_exclusive { true } else { entry.exclusive }` binding to the equivalent `request_exclusive || entry.exclusive` condition.
 - Preservation notes: released-lease filtering, same-agent filtering, conflict ordering, lease path compatibility, serialized JSON, and branch-change renew/release helpers were untouched.
 - Verification: worker fresh-eyes inspection passed; `cargo fmt --check`; `git diff --check`; `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-tools build_slots --locked`; `cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-tools --all-targets`; `cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-tools --all-targets -- -D warnings`; `ubs crates/mcp-agent-mail-tools/src/build_slots.rs` reported no critical findings.
